title: Registers Matter for Pixel-Space Diffusion Transformers
innovation_summary: Registers Matter for Pixel-Space Diffusion Transformers: In this work, we show that DiTs differ from ViTs in a key respect: they do not exhibit patch-token outliers but still benefit from registers.
